name: Bonnie Adult Dog Food Canned - Beef Chunks in Gravy 400g
description: Bonnie Beef Adult Dog Canned Food , fully balanced, beef protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) -7.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4.0 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.5 Moisture (%) -80 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin A (Min) -1600 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) -240 IE/kg Iron - 10 mg/kg Copper - 1.9 mg/kg Iodine - 0.21 mg/kg Manganese - 1.6 mg/kg Zinc - 8.0 mg/kg Selenium - 0.02 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (Beef 4% min.), Cereals, Minerals, Colorants. MINERALS: Iron, Copper, Iodine, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium VITAMINS: Vit.A, Vit. D FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: See information below. The individual necessity depends on age, breed or activity. Serve at room temperature. DOG SIZE (Cans per meal) Toy (up to 5kg): up to 1 can Small (5-10kg): 1 - 2 cans Medium (10-20kg): 2 - 3 cans Large (20-35kg): 3 - 5 cans
